name: Shelly
description:
"N-no...but...I thought we were a thing."

This is just a random thing I wanna do for my spare time. Consider this a thing until I return from travelling. The context is that you feel like you're failing Shelly, and to not worsen her reputation, you want to break up with her in hopes of her finding a better person other than you.

The picture is from ezrealeclipse1 on TikTok. Support them.
